scope: Purpose-limited historical reference for Stride 2B.4 identifier-based navigation adaptation only.

files.notes: Exact historical contiguous excerpt containing handleDetected and handleCancelScanner. It demonstrates that acquired raw input was interpreted and then navigated to an item route. Authorized only as reference for adapting identifier-based navigation under /app/legacy. It is not the complete App.tsx file and does not authorize Firebase, authentication, CaptureForm, dashboard, global layout, Tailwind, lucide-react, toast, or wholesale App restoration.

validation.sourceExcerptLocation: src/App.tsx lines 135-141 at the pinned source commit
validation.officialRepositoryLocalNodeValidator: NOT_RUN in packet-creation environment; AI Studio must run node scripts/validate-source-packet.cjs after download and extraction.

limitations: The payload is an exact contiguous excerpt, not the complete historical App.tsx file.
The packet authorizes adaptation of identifier-based navigation semantics only.
The destination route must remain under /app/legacy to preserve product-generation isolation.
Firebase, Firestore, authentication, persistence, item lookup, CaptureForm restoration, global layout restoration, NDEF payload parsing, and NFC tag writing are not part of this stride.
Scope boundaries guide implementation and reporting, but acceptance should primarily evaluate whether usable identifier-based navigation and direct-route behavior work.
